name: Banana Spicecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour, baking powder, soda, salt, and spices together three times.
2. Cream the shortening with sugar until fluffy.
3. Add eggs and beat thoroughly.
4. Add sifted dry ingredients and mashed bananas alternately in small amounts, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla.
6. Pour into greased pans.
7. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 35 minutes. Makes 2 (8 inch) layers.
